titleStmt.title: SII 41.207: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 207. (A.R. No. 425 of 1905.) Guḍimallūr, Walaja Taluk, North Arcot District. On the south and east walls of the central shrine in the Bhūmīśvara temple at Guḍimallūr.

summary.p: Records that the king remitted taxes payable both in money and in kind on lands in Kalavaippaṟṟu, whose crops had suffered due to the natural causes as such lands could not otherwise be taken up for cultivation. This order was to be engraved in the temples at Tiruvallam, Gudimallūr (in the temple of Maṇṇai-Nāyanār) and Kalavai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . cakalalokaccakravatti Irācanārāyaṇaṉ campuvarāyaṉ kalavaippaṟṟu nāṭṭārkku taṅkaḷ paṟṟu Āṟāvatuvaraiyum naṭṭuppāḻ nāṟṟaṭippāḻ vitaittuppāḻ Ivaiyiṟṟukku poṉvari cūlavari Uḷḷiṭṭa paṇavaṟkamum Aricikāṇamum koṇṭu potukaiyil Ittaippaṟṟip payir ceyvārillātapaṭiāle Eḻāvatu Āṭi mātamutal naṭṭuppāḻ nāṟṟaṭipāḻ vitaittupāḻ Ivaiyiṟṟukku poṉvari cūlavari Uḷḷiṭṭa
paṇavaṟkamum Aricikāṇamum cantirātittavaraiyum koḷḷātapaṭi colli viṭṭa Aḷavukku tiruvallattil koyililum maṇṇaināyaṉār koyililum kalavaiyil koyililum cantirātittavaraiyum cella kalveṭṭikkoḷḷumpaṭi colliviṭṭa Aḷavukku Ippaṭikku vaḻuttuṇaināyaṉār Āṇai tāḻvu Illai Inṉāḷ mutalukku Ippaṭikku kalluveṭṭuvittu koṇṭutāḻvaṟa naṭattippotavum .
Digital edition of SII 41.207 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
